channel.title: Paranormal Vault: Every Mystery Is Real
channel.description: The world's most terrifying unsolved mysteries in 60 seconds. Dyatlov Pass, Roswell, Bigfoot, MH370 — real cases, no explanation.
channel.itunes:author: Paranormal Vault
channel.itunes:summary: The world's most terrifying unsolved mysteries in 60 seconds. Dyatlov Pass, Roswell, Bigfoot, MH370 — real cases, no explanation.

item.title: Voynich manuscript
item.description: The Voynich manuscript is an illustrated codex, hand-written in an unknown script referred to as Voynichese. The vellum on which it is written has been carbon-dated to the early 15th century (1404–1438). Stylistic analysis has indicated the manuscript may have been composed in Italy during the Italian Renaissance. The origins, authorship, and purpose of the manuscript are still debated, but curren

item.title: Bermuda Triangle
item.description: The Bermuda Triangle, also known as the Devil's Triangle, is a loosely defined region in the North Atlantic Ocean, roughly bounded by Florida, Bermuda, and Puerto Rico. Since the mid-20th century, it has been the focus of an urban legend suggesting that many aircraft, ships, and people have disappeared there under mysterious circumstances. However, extensive investigations by reputable sources, in

item.title: Area 51
item.description: Area 51 is a highly classified United States Air Force (USAF) facility within the Nevada Test and Training Range in southern Nevada, 83 miles (134 km) north-northwest of Las Vegas. A remote detachment administered by Edwards Air Force Base, the facility is officially called Homey Airport (ICAO: KXTA, FAA LID: XTA) or Groom Lake (after the salt flat next to its airfield). Details of its operations
